@@ -1,21 +1,36 @@
 import Foundation
 
+enum DebugLogCategory: String, Codable, Equatable, Sendable {
+    case hotkey = "Hotkey"
+    case ocr = "OCR"
+    case cleanup = "Cleanup"
+    case model = "Model"
+    case performance = "Performance"
+}
+
 struct DebugLogEntry: Codable, Equatable, Sendable {
+    let id: UUID
     let timestamp: Date
+    let category: DebugLogCategory
     let message: String
 }
 
 final class DebugLogStore {
     private let url: URL
     private let fileManager: FileManager
     private let decoder = JSONDecoder()
+    private let encoder = JSONEncoder()
+    private let capacity: Int
 
     init(
         url: URL = AppSupportPaths.debugLogURL(),
-        fileManager: FileManager = .default
+        fileManager: FileManager = .default,
+        capacity: Int = 250
     ) {
         self.url = url
         self.fileManager = fileManager
+        self.capacity = capacity
+        encoder.outputFormatting = [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys]
     }
 
     func loadEntries() -> [DebugLogEntry] {
@@ -30,4 +45,32 @@ final class DebugLogStore {
             return []
         }
     }
+
+    func append(
+        category: DebugLogCategory,
+        message: String,
+        timestamp: Date = Date(),
+        id: UUID = UUID()
+    ) throws {
+        var entries = loadEntries()
+        entries.append(
+            DebugLogEntry(
+                id: id,
+                timestamp: timestamp,
+                category: category,
+                message: message
+            )
+        )
+
+        if entries.count > capacity {
+            entries.removeFirst(entries.count - capacity)
+        }
+
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(
+            at: url.deletingLastPathComponent(),
+            withIntermediateDirectories: true
+        )
+        let data = try encoder.encode(entries)
+        try data.write(to: url, options: .atomic)
+    }
 }

@@ -64,6 +64,71 @@ final class AppShellSupportTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertEqual(store.loadEntries(), [])
     }
 
+    func testDebugLogStoreWritesBoundedEntriesWithDocumentedSchema() throws {
+        let logURL = makeTemporaryFileURL()
+        let store = DebugLogStore(url: logURL)
+
+        for index in 0..<251 {
+            try store.append(
+                category: .hotkey,
+                message: "Entry \(index)",
+                timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: TimeInterval(index)),
+                id: UUID(uuidString: String(format: "00000000-0000-0000-0000-%012d", index))!
+            )
+        }
+
+        let entries = store.loadEntries()
+        XCTAssertEqual(entries.count, 250)
+        XCTAssertEqual(entries.first?.message, "Entry 1")
+        XCTAssertEqual(entries.last?.message, "Entry 250")
+        XCTAssertEqual(entries.last?.category, .hotkey)
+
+        let json = try XCTUnwrap(
+            JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: Data(contentsOf: logURL)) as? [[String: Any]]
+        )
+        let lastEntry = try XCTUnwrap(json.last)
+        XCTAssertEqual(Set(lastEntry.keys), ["id", "timestamp", "category", "message"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(lastEntry["category"] as? String, "Hotkey")
+    }
+
+    func testAppSupportPathsMatchDocumentedLayout() {
+        let root = AppSupportPaths.applicationSupportRootURL()
+        let debugLog = AppSupportPaths.debugLogURL()
+        let cleanupModels = AppSupportPaths.cleanupModelsRootURL()
+        let whisperModels = AppSupportPaths.whisperModelsRootURL()
+        let transcriptionLab = AppSupportPaths.transcriptionLabRootURL()
+        let transcriptionAudio = AppSupportPaths.transcriptionLabAudioRootURL()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(root.path.hasSuffix("/Library/Application Support/GhostPepper"))
+        XCTAssertEqual(debugLog.deletingLastPathComponent(), root)
+        XCTAssertEqual(cleanupModels.deletingLastPathComponent(), root)
+        XCTAssertEqual(whisperModels.deletingLastPathComponent(), root)
+        XCTAssertEqual(transcriptionLab.deletingLastPathComponent(), root)
+        XCTAssertEqual(transcriptionAudio.deletingLastPathComponent(), transcriptionLab)
+    }
+
+    func testBundleMetadataMatchesConfiguredEnvironmentValues() {
+        let bundle = Bundle.main
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "LSUIElement") as? Bool, true)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "NSMicrophoneUsageDescription") as? String,
+            "Ghost Pepper needs microphone access to record your voice for transcription."
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "SUFeedURL") as? String,
+            "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/matthartman/ghost-pepper/main/appcast.xml"
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "SUPublicEDKey") as? String,
+            "aU72TC8lOwqKtnWlwAkT8z7LhIvB+LRnUNRNNw9DmDQ="
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "CFBundleDisplayName") as? String, "Ghost Pepper")
+        XCTAssertEqual(bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "CFBundleIdentifier") as? String, "com.github.matthartman.ghostpepper")
+        XCTAssertEqual(bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "CFBundleShortVersionString") as? String, "1.9")
+        XCTAssertEqual(bundle.object(forInfoDictionaryKey: "CFBundleVersion") as? String, "10")
+    }
+
     func testSettingsWindowManagerReusesWindowAfterCloseAttempt() throws {
         let manager = SettingsWindowManager()
         manager.show()

@@ -71,4 +78,25 @@ final class SettingsStoreTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertEqual(defaults.object(forKey: "hasSetLaunchAtLogin") as? Bool, true)

     }
+
+    func testInvalidCleanupModelKindFallsBackToDefaultOnInitialization() throws {
+        defaults.set("not-a-real-model", forKey: "selectedCleanupModelKind")
+
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.selectedCleanupModelKind, SettingsStore.defaultCleanupModelKind)
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "selectedCleanupModelKind"), SettingsStore.defaultCleanupModelKind)
+    }
+
+    func testUpdatingCleanupPromptAndDraftsPersistsStringsToUserDefaults() throws {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        store.cleanupPrompt = "Keep all wording."
+        store.preferredTranscriptionsDraft = "OpenAI => OpenAI"
+        store.commonlyMisheardDraft = "ship it => ship it"
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "cleanupPrompt"), "Keep all wording.")
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "preferredTranscriptionsDraft"), "OpenAI => OpenAI")
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "commonlyMisheardDraft"), "ship it => ship it")
+    }
 }

@@ -124,6 +124,36 @@ final class TranscriptionLabArchiveStoreTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertFalse(FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: audioDirectoryURL.path()))
     }
 
+    func testLoadTimingsSilentlyDropsInvalidUUIDKeys() throws {
+        let rootURL = makeTemporaryRootURL()
+        let timingsURL = rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-timings.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: rootURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+        let payload = """
+        {
+          "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111": {
+            "transcriptionDuration": 1.2,
+            "cleanupDuration": 0.4
+          },
+          "not-a-uuid": {
+            "transcriptionDuration": 5.0,
+            "cleanupDuration": 1.0
+          }
+        }
+        """
+        try Data(payload.utf8).write(to: timingsURL)
+        let store = TranscriptionLabArchiveStore(rootURL: rootURL)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.loadTimings(),
+            [
+                "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111": TranscriptionLabStageTiming(
+                    transcriptionDuration: 1.2,
+                    cleanupDuration: 0.4
+                )
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
     private func makeTemporaryRootURL() -> URL {
         let rootURL = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory
             .appending(path: UUID().uuidString, directoryHint: .isDirectory)

@@ -30,3 +30,13 @@
 - Built the menu-bar shell and lifecycle scaffolding: onboarding gating, reusable settings/debug/onboarding windows, launch-at-login registration and toggle control, lazy update checking, automatic-termination handling, and termination cleanup coordination seams.
 - Hardened shell-facing persistence and recovery behavior with new settings flags, debug-log corruption recovery, status/menu feedback coverage, and a test-harness fix that injects Accessibility trust into `PasteTargetMonitorTests` now that the monitor correctly refuses AX work when trust is absent.
 **Summary:** Delivered the permission and app-shell layer around the dictation skeleton. Ghost Pepper now starts through the documented permission sequence, exposes the onboarding-only and post-onboarding dropdown shells, reuses its shell windows, tracks launch-at-login and update-checking state, and recovers safely from corrupted shell-side storage. During wrap-up, later-dependent stories were moved forward instead of being marked done prematurely: STORY-0599 to ITER-0004, STORY-0605 and STORY-0606 to ITER-0005, STORY-0854 to ITER-0007, STORY-0038, STORY-0047, and STORY-0838 to ITER-0011, STORY-0040, STORY-0046, and STORY-0048 to ITER-0012, STORY-0840, STORY-0841, and STORY-0842 to ITER-0013, and STORY-0034 to ITER-0016.
+
+## ITER-0003
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-09
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0495, STORY-0496, STORY-0497, STORY-0498, STORY-0499, STORY-0500, STORY-0501, STORY-0502, STORY-0504, STORY-0505, STORY-0507, STORY-0508, STORY-0510, STORY-0511, STORY-0515, STORY-0516, STORY-0517, STORY-0518, STORY-0519, STORY-0520, STORY-0521, STORY-0522, STORY-0523, STORY-0524, STORY-0525, STORY-0527, STORY-0530, STORY-0531, STORY-0534, STORY-0535, STORY-0538
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Added durable settings defaults and write-back behavior for cleanup prompt, cleanup model selection, and correction drafts while preserving the documented UserDefaults value types and hotkey binding storage keys.
+- Formalized the Application Support path helpers and persistence contracts for debug logs and transcription-lab artifacts, including bounded atomic debug-log writes and invalid UUID filtering for persisted stage timings.
+- Locked the shell metadata and persistence invariants down with coverage for menu-bar bundle values, Application Support layout, debug-log schema, and the updated settings and transcription-lab persistence behavior.
+**Summary:** Delivered the persistence-contract layer behind the app shell. Ghost Pepper now writes the documented first-run defaults back into `UserDefaults`, preserves cleanup and draft preferences as typed values, persists bounded debug-log entries with stable UUIDs, and enforces the expected Application Support layout for debug logs and transcription-lab artifacts. During wrap-up, stories that still depend on later subsystems were moved instead of being marked done prematurely: STORY-0513, STORY-0514, STORY-0526, and STORY-0529 to ITER-0004, STORY-0506 and STORY-0528 to ITER-0005, STORY-0509 and STORY-0537 to ITER-0009, STORY-0494 to ITER-0010, STORY-0512 and STORY-0532 to ITER-0011, STORY-0533 to ITER-0016, STORY-0503 to ITER-0017, and STORY-0536 to ITER-0019.
